title_en: Thinking Machines Lab's Interaction Model: Making Conversation Native to the Model
dek_en: On May 11, Thinking Machines Lab — the venture founded by former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati — published research on what it calls the **Interaction Model**. The central claim, as relayed in the video: every frontier AI lab has optimized for the
title_zh: Thinking Machines Lab 的交互模型:让 AI 从"发邮件"变成"面对面对话"
dek_zh: 5 月 11 日,前 OpenAI 首席技术官 Mira Murati 创办的 Thinking Machines Lab 发布了一项新研究,名为"交互模型"(Interaction Model)。在最佳拍档频道一期由主持人大飞带来的解读中,这次发布被定位为对人机协作底层逻辑的重构——把"交互"从一项外挂功能,变成大模型的原生基因。大飞在视频中梳理了 Thinking Machines Lab 的核心论点、技术路径和基准数据,以下是这场解读的要点。
